rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 score and raise the same substantive points: diverse multi-language software development experience as strengths, and lack of direct C++ experience plus no geospatial data processing experience plus a web/mobile rather than domain focus as concerns. The variant text is merely a reworded, slightly more concise restatement of the baseline with no new concern, no shifted reasoning, and nothing that references location, nationality, or the Kenya change. These differences are within ordinary run-to-run wording noise.
